artifacts.excerpt: Me and my entire team just got laid off. If you want to hire kickass 3D Web TypeScript engineers, I have a whole bunch ready and eager. We are @threejs experts.

artifacts.excerpt:
Bret Weinstein recently stated that genetics alone is insufficient to explain a category of evolutionary change, and that a programming layer on top of (epi)genetics is likely the missing piece.

Michael Levin's bioelectric field seems to be the exact kind of thing...

artifacts.title: Which receipt from 2023-02-01
artifacts.excerpt:
Ethereal Engine v1.0.0 has been released! 🥳🤯🎮

Not a release candidate! We are considering this the official production ready version of the engine. The main features highlighted are a rework character controller, which allow for proper locomotion via non-virtual movement, https://t.co/3Ayzoj2gZa
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: which, only, love, choice.

artifacts.title: Which receipt from 2022-06-14
artifacts.excerpt:
@NoraBateson Of course then we get to the issue of the ontology of 'better'. I refuse to define it beyond 'change which comes from a place of unconditional love'.

Thus we have tranformation defined as a contextual relational change derived from that which is unconditionally loving. /2
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: which, only, love, choice.

artifacts.title: Only receipt from 2022-08-09
artifacts.excerpt:
I'm rather excited. 

We have the only realtime multi-user, cross-platform, augmented and viertual reality with IK, Volumetric Video, eCommerce and realtime editing tools.

Lots of hard work paying off to enable the free and open social spatial web.

https://t.co/UKrEuVodrs https://t.co/CE79VNwODX
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: only, time, open, space.

artifacts.title: Only receipt from 2022-11-20
artifacts.excerpt: @jgreenhall @SamoBurja Exactly the sort of thing DAOs seem designed to do. Only need a few small key investors, with bulk of the money in escrow via a crowdfunded DAO, where interest is repaid via cutting the bloat. Many ways of doing it.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: only, time, open, space.

artifacts.title: Only receipt from 2023-10-12
artifacts.excerpt:
Escape learned helplessness at all costs. 

Your fear is Moloch's currency. 

Your hatred is Mars' fuel.

Your time is Mammon's essence. 

Freedom, growth and joy come only from agency, mastery and connection.

It is up to us and us alone to define ourselves.

The future awaits.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: only, time, open, space.

artifacts.title: Only receipt from 2022-07-26
